en: That is so strange. Human resources wants to talk to me tomorrow.
Could you stop licking your ass for two minutes?
ko: 두 분만 엉덩이를 핥는 걸 멈출 수 있어?

en: Do you really think you should be drinking right now?
How else am I supposed to talk to the human resources lady?
I don't know. Seek professional help. I did.
The guy at the liquor store said this stuff tastes great in coffee.
ko: 받았어. 술집 아저씨가 이거 커피에 넣으면 맛있다고 하더라.

en: You got called in too? What is going on?
Sheldon threw us all under the bus. I feel like I've been called down to the principal's office.
Although I wouldn't mind if brown sugar suspended me.
From a sex swing. This may have been a mistake.
Everything's going to be fine. Before I met Bernadette, I was in here every other day.
ko: 버나뎃을 만나기 전에는 매일 여기 왔어.
